items.title: Star Wars - Chewbacca I Woke Up Like This T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: star, wars, chewbacca, woke, like, this. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
